summary: Citation contexts have been ranked for local overclaim and boundary risk so a fresh reviewer can prioritize exact source-to-claim verification.

context_triage.safe_use: 事件时间、删失、生存曲线和协变量风险建模的基础方法。
context_triage.forbidden_use: 不证明任何具体延寿、健康、AI 或资源干预有效。
reviewer_focus: Check whether the does-not-support boundary is preserved in prose and figure captions.
Check whether the source supports only the local usedFor statement, not the broader Human Infra theory.
context_triage.required_action: Fresh reviewer can sample after higher-risk contexts are resolved.

context_triage.source_group: Grossman Health Capital; WHO HALE; NICE QALY
context_triage.safe_use: T -> E 的测量语言和健康质量调整视角。
context_triage.forbidden_use: 不能完整定义主体连续性，也不能替代个体医学判断。
reviewer_focus: Check whether the does-not-support boundary is preserved in prose and figure captions.
Check whether the source supports only the local usedFor statement, not the broader Human Infra theory.
Reject any upgrade from method, association, or framework language to concrete lifespan-extension evidence.
context_triage.required_action: Fresh reviewer must inspect exact source-to-claim support and boundary wording.

context_triage.source_group: Hallmarks of Aging; GrimAge; Cognitive Reserve
context_triage.safe_use: 状态变量和风险信号的机制/关联入口。
context_triage.forbidden_use: 不能把机制综述、预测关联或认知储备直接写成干预效果。
reviewer_focus: Check whether the does-not-support boundary is preserved in prose and figure captions.
Check whether the source supports only the local usedFor statement, not the broader Human Infra theory.
context_triage.required_action: Fresh reviewer should confirm the context is scoped and not overgeneralized.

context_triage.forbidden_use: 时间本身不会自动产生能力；错误反馈和低质量重复可能反向损害表现。
reviewer_focus: Check whether the does-not-support boundary is preserved in prose and figure captions.
Check whether the source supports only the local usedFor statement, not the broader Human Infra theory.
context_triage.required_action: Fresh reviewer can sample after higher-risk contexts are resolved.

reviewer_focus: Check whether the does-not-support boundary is preserved in prose and figure captions.

context_triage.source_group: Target Trial Emulation; ClinicalTrials.gov; WHO ICTRP; TRIPOD+AI; PROBAST+AI; CONSORT-AI; SPIRIT-AI
context_triage.safe_use: population、intervention、comparator、time zero、outcome、estimand、试验登记、AI 干预报告、验证、校准和偏倚审查。
context_triage.forbidden_use: 不能消除所有不可测混杂，也不证明任何注册试验或预测模型有效。
